nasb.text: And Judah took Gaza with its territory and Ashkelon with its territory and Ekron with its territory.

esv.text: Judah also captured Gaza with its territory, and Ashkelon with its territory, and Ekron with its territory.

cnv.text: 猶大又攻取了迦薩和迦薩的四境，亞實基倫和亞實基倫的四境，以革倫和以革倫的四境。

ccb.text: 犹大人又夺取了迦萨、亚实基伦和以革伦三座城邑及周围地区。
